Business: Plastiblends India Limited engages in the manufacture and sale of masterbatches in India and internationally. The company offers additive, white, black, color, polywhite (filler), PET, and white masterbatches; and conductive and engineered plastic compounds. Its products are used in agriculture, appliances, automotive and transportation, electrical…

  Current: 15.03  (-5.11% vs prior)
  India impact: High VIX → risk-off, FII sell EMs including India; low VIX → risk-on, inflows
